metadata.title: Image Converter
metadata.description: Convert, compress and resize images from one format to another by dragging and dropping or pasting into the note. HEIC, TIF, JPG, WEBP, PNG.

.setTooltip("Fit: Maintains aspect ratio within dimensions
Fill: Exactly matches dimensions
Longest Edge: Limits the longest side
Shortest Edge: Limits the shortest side
Width/Height: Constrains single dimension")
regex.target:
.setTooltip("适应：在尺寸内保持纵横比
填充：完全匹配尺寸
最长边：限制最长边
最短边：限制最短边
宽度/高度：限制单个维度")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the mode to use when resizing the image. Resizing an image will further reduce file-size, but it will resize your actual file, which means that the original file will be modified, and the changes will be permanent.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择调整图像大小时要使用的模式。调整图像大小将进一步减小文件大小，但它将调整您的实际文件，这意味着原始文件将被修改，更改将是永久性的。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Selecting this will skip images that already are in the target format. This is useful if you have a very large library, and want to process images in batches.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择此选项将跳过已经是目标格式的图片。如果您有一个非常庞大的图片库，并且希望批量处理图片，这将非常有用。")

regex.source: text:"Below settings allow you to specify how long Obsidian should 												wait before timing-out the image processing. E.g.: when file is extra												large 100MB+ it might freeze Obsidian - Image Converter will try to do												the best it can to process it - however if it takes too long it will stop"
regex.target: text:"以下设置允许您指定 Obsidian 在超时图像处理之前应等待的时间。例如：当文件超大 100MB+ 时，它可能会冻结 Obsidian - Image Converter 将尝试尽最大努力处理它 - 但是，如果时间过长，它会停止。"
Notice(`已成功处理 ${o} 张图像。`)

regex.source: text:'Below settings allow you to adjust image dimensions using the standard ObsidianMD\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmethod by modifying image links. For instance, to change the width of ![[Engelbart.jpg]],\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\twe add "| 100" at the end, resulting in ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]]'
regex.target: text:'以下设置允许您通过修改图片链接来调整图片尺寸,使用标准的 ObsidianMD 方法。例如,要更改 ![[Engelbart.jpg]] 的宽度,我们在末尾添加 "| 100",结果为 ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]]'

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the default size which should be applied on all dropped/pasted images. For example, if you specify \t\t\t\t\t\t\tcustom size as '250' then when you drop or paste an 'image.jpg' it would become ![[image.jpg | 250]] ")

regex.source:
.setTooltip("Supports multiple pattern types:

1. Glob patterns:
   *.png, draft-*, test-?.jpg
   * = any characters
   ? = single character

2. Regular expressions:
   /pattern/ or r/pattern/ or regex:pattern

Examples:
 *.png (all PNG files)
 draft-* (files starting with draft-)
 /^IMG_\d{4}\./ (IMG_ followed by 4 digits)
 r/\.(jpe?g|png)$/ (files ending in .jpg/.jpeg/.png)
 regex:^(draft|temp)- (files starting with draft- or temp-)")
regex.target:
.setTooltip("支持多种模式类型：

1. 通配符模式：
   *.png, draft-*, test-?.jpg
   * = 任意字符
   ? = 单个字符

2. 正则表达式：
   /pattern/ 或 r/pattern/ 或 regex:pattern

示例：
 *.png（所有PNG文件）
 draft-*（以 draft- 开头的文件）
 /^IMG_\d{4}\./（以 IMG_ 后跟 4 位数字开头）
 r/\.(jpe?g|png)$/（以 .jpg/.jpeg/.png 结尾的文件）
 regex:^(draft|temp)-（以 draft- 或 temp- 开头的文件）")

regex.target: description:"宽度和高度的绝对差值"

regex.source: .setDesc("Enter a custom subfolder name or path.")
regex.target: .setDesc("输入自定义的子文件夹名称或路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If the processed image filesize is larger than the original, use the original image instead.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("如果处理后的图像文件大小比原始图像大，则使用原始图像取而代之。")
.setDesc ("在维基链接（Wikilink）和 Markdown 格式之间进行选择。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Comma-separated list of patterns to skip (glob or regex). Regex patterns must be enclosed in `/` or `r/` or `regex:` E.g. do not proecss images which include word CAT in them /CAT/")
regex.target: .setDesc (" 以逗号分隔的要跳过的匹配模式列表（可使用通配符模式或正则表达式）。正则表达式模式必须用 /、r/ 或 regex: 包裹。例如，不处理文件名中包含 'CAT' 这个单词的图像，可写成 /CAT/。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Plugin automatically reads the original image dimensions and applies the provided value to the longer of the width or height. The other dimension is then calculated automatically if 'Maintain aspect ratio' is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("插件会自动读取原始图像的尺寸，并将所提供的值应用于图像的宽度或高度中的较长边。如果启用了 “保持宽高比” 选项，那么另一边的尺寸将自动计算得出。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Plugin automatically reads the original image dimensions and applies the provided value to the shorter of the width or height. The other dimension is then calculated automatically if 'Maintain aspect ratio' is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("插件会自动读取原始图像的尺寸，并将所提供的值应用于宽度或高度中较短的一边。若启用了 “保持宽高比” 选项，另一边的尺寸将自动计算得出。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set both width and height using the format |widthxheight (e.g., 300x200) or percentage format (e.g., 50x75). This does not preserve Aspect Ratio.")
regex.target: .setDesc (" 使用 宽度x高度 的格式（例如，300x200）或百分比格式（例如，50x75）来同时设置宽度和高度。这种方式不会保留图像的宽高比。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the maximum width of the image to fit within the editor's width. You can specify a percentage or a fixed pixel value.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("设置图像的最大宽度，使其能适配编辑器的宽度。你可以指定一个百分比或一个固定的像素值。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Preserve the image's original proportions when resizing.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("在调整图像大小时，保留图像的原始宽高比。")

regex.source:
.setDesc("Controls how images are adjusted relative to target size:
- Auto: Adjusts image to fit specified dimensions
- Reduce Only: Only shrinks images larger than target
- Enlarge Only: Only enlarges images smaller than target")
regex.target:
.setDesc (" 控制图像相对于目标尺寸的调整方式：
- 自动：将图像调整为适应指定的尺寸。
- 仅缩小：仅缩小比目标尺寸大的图像。
- 仅放大：仅放大比目标尺寸小的图像。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When calculating dimensions, prevent the image from exceeding the editor's width.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("在计算图像尺寸时，防止图像宽度超出编辑器的宽度。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Lower values mean better quality (larger file size). 0 is lossless.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("数值越低意味着质量越好（文件大小越大）。数值为 0 时表示无损处理。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Process images in all subfolders as well")
regex.target: .setDesc ("同时处理所有子文件夹中的图像。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose output format. 'Same as original' applies compression/resizing to current format.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("选择输出格式。“与原始格式相同” 选项会对当前格式的图像进行压缩 / 调整大小操作。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Comma-separated list (no dots or spaces, e.g., png,gif).")
regex.target: .setDesc ("以逗号分隔的列表（不要包含点号或空格，例如：png,gif）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Skip compression/resizing if image is already in target format.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("如果图像已经是目标格式，则跳过压缩 / 调整大小的操作。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose how images should be resized. Note: Results are permanent")
regex.target: .setDesc ("选择图像应如何调整大小。注意：调整结果是永久性的。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Reduce and Enlarge: Adjusts all images. Reduce only: Shrinks larger images. Enlarge only: Enlarges smaller images.")
regex.target: .setDesc ("缩小和放大：对所有图像进行调整。仅缩小：缩小尺寸大于目标的图像。仅放大：放大尺寸小于目标的图像。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select a global preset to apply multiple settings at once")
regex.target: .setDesc ("选择一个全局预设以一次性应用多个设置。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Enable to show a right-click context menu.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("启用以显示右键上下文菜单。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Where to place the cursor after dropping or pasting the image")
regex.target: .setTooltip("在放置或粘贴图像后将光标放置在何处")

regex.source: .setTooltip("A comma-separated list of file names or patterns that the plugin should never process. Supports glob (*) and regex (enclosed in `/` or `r/` or `regex:`). E.g., `old.png, /^_/, r/temp-.*\\.jpg$/` . Or simply skip all cat images e.g.: /cat/ or all gif images *.gif")
regex.target: .setTooltip("一个由逗号分隔的文件名或模式列表，插件永远不应处理这些内容。支持通配符（*）和正则表达式（用/或r/或regex:括起来）。例如，old.png, /^_/, r/temp-.*\\.jpg$/ 。或者简单地跳过所有猫相关的图像，例如：/cat/ ，或者跳过所有的 gif 图像 *.gif")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Display a notification showing how much space was saved after processing an image.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("显示一条通知，该通知展示在处理完一张图像后节省了多少空间。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Save current selection as a new Global Preset")
regex.target: .setTooltip("将当前所选内容保存为一个新的全局预设")

regex.source: .setTooltip("If you use Obsidian Sync, it is strongly recommended to use the SAME location on all your devices to ensure consistent behavior. Default: .obsidian (syncable).")
regex.target: .setTooltip("If you use Obsidian Sync, it is strongly recommended to use the SAME location on all your devices to ensure consistent behavior. Default: .obsidian (syncable).")

regex.source: .setTooltip("This creates a new <DIV> under the image to show resizing HANDLES. But this might cause some incompatibility with certain themes and cause images to jump around.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("如果你使用Obsidian同步功能，强烈建议在你所有设备上使用相同的位置，以确保行为的一致性。默认值：.obsidian（可同步）。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Where to place the cursor when resizing an image. Note: 'Don't move cursor' - will try to keep your exisiting cursor in place but if you DRAG-RESIZE and cursor is still over the image when you finish resizing, it will get the text selected.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("调整图像大小时将光标放置在何处。注意：“不移动光标” - 将尝试使您现有的光标保持在原位，但如果您进行拖动调整大小操作，并且在完成调整大小时光标仍在图像上方，那么文本将会被选中。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Provide full-path to the binary file. It can be inside vault or anywhere in your file system.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("提供二进制文件的完整路径。它可以位于保险库（vault）内，也可以在您文件系统的任何位置。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Instructs pngquant to use the least amount of colors required to meet or exceed the max quality. min and max are numbers in range 0 (worst) to 100 (perfect).")
regex.target: .setTooltip("指示pngquant使用达到或超过最大质量所需的最少颜色数量。“最小值”和“最大值”是范围在0（最差）到100（完美）之间的数字。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Same as original: preserves current format while applying compression/resizing")
regex.target: .setTooltip("与原始格式相同：在应用压缩/调整大小操作时保留当前格式")

regex.source: .setTooltip("100: No compression (original quality)\n75: Recommended (good balance)\n0-50: High compression (lower quality)")
regex.target: .setTooltip("100：不压缩（原始质量）\n75：推荐值（良好的平衡状态）\n0到50：高压缩率（质量较低）")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Comma-separated list of file formats to skip (e.g., tif,tiff,heic). Leave empty to process all formats.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("要跳过的文件格式的逗号分隔列表（例如，tif、tiff、heic）。留空则处理所有格式。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("If image is already in target format, this allows you to skip its compression, conversion and resizing. Processing of all other formats will be still performed.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("如果图像已经是目标格式，这使您能够跳过对它的压缩、转换和调整大小操作。但对所有其他格式的处理仍将进行。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("• Reduce and Enlarge: Adjusts all images to fit specified dimensions\n• Reduce only: Only shrinks images larger than target\n• Enlarge only: Only enlarges images smaller than target")
regex.target: .setTooltip("• 缩小和放大：调整所有图像以适应指定的尺寸\n• 仅缩小：仅缩小大于目标尺寸的图像\n• 仅放大：仅放大小于目标尺寸的图像")
.setTitle("处理所有"+("md"===e.extension?"笔记":"画布中的图像")
